title: Design-of-Experiments In Vitro Transcription Yield Optimization of Self-Amplifying RNA
author: Samnuan, Karnyart
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains original data generated from optimizing the IVT process for saRNAs that are approximately 9 kb in size through a design of experiment (DoE) approach to produce a maximal RNA yield.
steps_raw: This dataset contains original data generated from optimizing the IVT process for saRNAs that are approximately 9 kb in size through a design of experiment (DoE) approach to produce a maximal RNA yield.
